Class AsyncApi30SchemaImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.asyncapi.v3x.v30.AsyncApi30SchemaImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApiExtensible, AsyncApiReferenceable, AsyncApiSchema, AsyncApi3xExtensible, AsyncApi3xReferenceable, AsyncApi3xSchema, AsyncApi30Extensible, AsyncApi30Referenceable, AsyncApi30Schema, Extensible, Node, Referenceable, Schema, AnySchemaUnion, BooleanSchemaUnion, MultiFormatSchemaSchemaUnion, SchemaSchemaListUnion, Union, Visitable
